fixes_this_run: Fixed DeepStatePage TIER_CONFIG: monochrome colors -> semantic CSS variables (verified=#166534, circumstantial=#92400E, disputed=#991B1B)
Added icon field to TIER_CONFIG for future badge enhancement (✓, ◐, ⚠)
Fixed ContentGate z-index from z-50 to z-40 (header stacking conflict)
Wired NewsletterSignup + ContentGate into DeepStatePage (completes subscriber pipeline across all major pages)
Added dns-prefetch hints for GTM, HubSpot, Stripe, Google Translate
Added theme-color meta tags for light (#FDFBF7) and dark (#0A0A0A)
Dark mode: replaced hardcoded bg-white with semantic bg-parchment in ExitIntentCapture, ContentGate, CommunityForum, DeepStatePage, MembershipPage
Dark mode: fixed DeepStatePage person card border fallback rgba(0,0,0,0.1) -> var(--color-border)
Dark mode: Diagrams.tsx SVG — replaced 22 hardcoded hex fills (#333/#666/#999/#1A1A1A) with CSS variable equivalents
Enhanced ReadingProgress: moved from top-0/z-60 to top-52px/z-40 (below header), added background track
Extended ReadingProgress to IsraelDossierPage and DeepStatePage (was only on ChapterPage)
A11y audit: confirmed skip-nav, focus-visible, aria-labels, 44px touch targets, alt text — no issues found
